# DEF-0004 — Webpack factory `Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'call')`

| Field      | Value                                                |
| ---------- | ---------------------------------------------------- |
| Status     | **Closed (same root cause as DEF-0003)**             |
| Pillar     | A — Smoke (page-error hard-fail)                     |
| Severity   | Critical (blocked dashboard rendering)               |
| Opened     | 2026-04-17                                           |
| Closed     | 2026-04-17                                           |
| Owner      | Platform                                             |
| Related    | DEF-0003                                             |

## Captured evidence

```
Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'call')
    at options.factory (webpack.js:715:31)
    at __webpack_require__ (webpack.js:37:33)
    at fn (webpack.js:371:21)
    at requireModule (react-server-dom-webpack-client.browser.development.js:201:23)
    at initializeModuleChunk (react-server-dom-webpack-client.browser.development.js:1376:17)
    …
```

## Diagnosis

Downstream of DEF-0003. The corrupted Next.js dev build map left a
chunk record pointing to an undefined factory. The parent React tree
fell back to client rendering, which then surfaced as the "expected
server HTML to contain a matching `<a>` in `<div>`" hydration warning
in DEF-0003.

## Minimum fix

Same fix as DEF-0003 — stop, clear named cache volume, restart.

## Verification

Same Pillar A smoke run as DEF-0003. Zero `pageerror` events triggered
across 173 navigations (4 roles × ~43 routes).

## Anti-weakening attestation (per §4.2)

- [x] No `try/catch` was added in production code to swallow the
      original error.
- [x] No `pageerror` listener filter was added in
      `fixtures/errors.ts`.
- [x] No `.skip` was added.

## Recurrence prevention

Same as DEF-0003.
